## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Town and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance metrics, and upcoming plans for Town's blog.](https://fathom.video/share/5s1H_CjQWR8PxShJn1fNY7ZQ21n5BWA5?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content production is ramping up, with 11 new articles submitted for review and 5 more lined up](https://fathom.video/share/5s1H_CjQWR8PxShJn1fNY7ZQ21n5BWA5?tab=summary&timestamp=313.0)
  - [Organic traffic to the blog is showing consistent growth, albeit still in early stages](https://fathom.video/share/5s1H_CjQWR8PxShJn1fNY7ZQ21n5BWA5?tab=summary&timestamp=373.0)
  - [The team needs to refine their approach to topic selection and approval process](https://fathom.video/share/5s1H_CjQWR8PxShJn1fNY7ZQ21n5BWA5?tab=summary&timestamp=775.0)
  - [Alternative content strategies are needed to accommodate reduced tax review capacity](https://fathom.video/share/5s1H_CjQWR8PxShJn1fNY7ZQ21n5BWA5?tab=summary&timestamp=1039.0)

## Topics

### Content Production Progress

  - [3 new articles published since last meeting](https://fathom.video/share/5s1H_CjQWR8PxShJn1fNY7ZQ21n5BWA5?tab=summary&timestamp=313.0)
  - [11 articles submitted for review](https://fathom.video/share/5s1H_CjQWR8PxShJn1fNY7ZQ21n5BWA5?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)
  - [5 more articles lined up for production](https://fathom.video/share/5s1H_CjQWR8PxShJn1fNY7ZQ21n5BWA5?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)
  - [Need more approved topics to maintain production pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/5s1H_CjQWR8PxShJn1fNY7ZQ21n5BWA5?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)

### Traffic and Performance Metrics

  - [Consistent growth in clicks, traffic, and impressions](https://fathom.video/share/5s1H_CjQWR8PxShJn1fNY7ZQ21n5BWA5?tab=summary&timestamp=373.0)
  - [69 views on articles from Aug 27 to Sep 2 (mostly single-digit views per article)](https://fathom.video/share/5s1H_CjQWR8PxShJn1fNY7ZQ21n5BWA5?tab=summary&timestamp=399.0)
  - [Using combination of Looker and Google Analytics data for comprehensive insights](https://fathom.video/share/5s1H_CjQWR8PxShJn1fNY7ZQ21n5BWA5?tab=summary&timestamp=449.0)
  - [Still considered "early stages" for drawing conclusions; clearer picture expected in a couple of months](https://fathom.video/share/5s1H_CjQWR8PxShJn1fNY7ZQ21n5BWA5?tab=summary&timestamp=576.0)

### Topic Approval Process

  - [Confusion around the current approval process and strategy](https://fathom.video/share/5s1H_CjQWR8PxShJn1fNY7ZQ21n5BWA5?tab=summary&timestamp=775.0)
  - [Need to align on how to evaluate and select topics for maximum impact](https://fathom.video/share/5s1H_CjQWR8PxShJn1fNY7ZQ21n5BWA5?tab=summary&timestamp=914.0)
  - [Ehtisham to sync with Ada on refining the topic proposal and approval workflow](https://fathom.video/share/5s1H_CjQWR8PxShJn1fNY7ZQ21n5BWA5?tab=summary&timestamp=881.0)

### Content Strategy Adjustments

  - [Tax team has limited capacity for reviews until October 15th](https://fathom.video/share/5s1H_CjQWR8PxShJn1fNY7ZQ21n5BWA5?tab=summary&timestamp=1041.0)
  - [Need to develop alternative topic clusters that don't require extensive tax review](https://fathom.video/share/5s1H_CjQWR8PxShJn1fNY7ZQ21n5BWA5?tab=summary&timestamp=1121.0)
  - [Exploring options like SMB-focused content, tool recommendations, and industry expert interviews](https://fathom.video/share/5s1H_CjQWR8PxShJn1fNY7ZQ21n5BWA5?tab=summary&timestamp=1127.0)
  - [Considering partner collaborations for content that doesn't need tax approval](https://fathom.video/share/5s1H_CjQWR8PxShJn1fNY7ZQ21n5BWA5?tab=summary&timestamp=1366.0)

### Experimental Content Initiatives

  - [Planning to implement "hidden question log" or shadow blog](https://fathom.video/share/5s1H_CjQWR8PxShJn1fNY7ZQ21n5BWA5?tab=summary&timestamp=1212.0)
  - [Will create 2 initial topics for this experiment](https://fathom.video/share/5s1H_CjQWR8PxShJn1fNY7ZQ21n5BWA5?tab=summary&timestamp=1214.0)
  - [Content will be no-indexed and not visible on the main site to avoid potential SEO issues](https://fathom.video/share/5s1H_CjQWR8PxShJn1fNY7ZQ21n5BWA5?tab=summary&timestamp=1289.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Ehtisham to sync with Ada on refining topic approval process and strategy](https://fathom.video/share/5s1H_CjQWR8PxShJn1fNY7ZQ21n5BWA5?tab=summary&timestamp=881.0)
  - [Develop and present 10-15 alternative topic ideas that don't require extensive tax review](https://fathom.video/share/5s1H_CjQWR8PxShJn1fNY7ZQ21n5BWA5?tab=summary&timestamp=1121.0)
  - [Create a new topic cluster focused on SMB-relevant content without heavy tax implications](https://fathom.video/share/5s1H_CjQWR8PxShJn1fNY7ZQ21n5BWA5?tab=summary&timestamp=1427.0)
  - [Implement 2 articles for the "hidden question log" experiment](https://fathom.video/share/5s1H_CjQWR8PxShJn1fNY7ZQ21n5BWA5?tab=summary&timestamp=1214.0)
  - [Explore potential partner collaboration opportunities for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/5s1H_CjQWR8PxShJn1fNY7ZQ21n5BWA5?tab=summary&timestamp=1366.0)
  - [Continue weekly performance tracking and reporting](https://fathom.video/share/5s1H_CjQWR8PxShJn1fNY7ZQ21n5BWA5?tab=summary&timestamp=1445.0)
